title: Scaffold a Crossplane XRD + per-provider Compositions
description: Generate a shared Crossplane v2 XRD (the abstract resource) plus one function-kcl Composition package per cloud provider. The runtime resource picks a backend via spec.crossplane.compositionSelector. Each provider package publishes its own OCI KCL module.

name.description: Resource name (singular), e.g. bucket. Becomes the XR kind (Bucket).

providers.description: Cloud backends to scaffold a Composition package for.

directory.description: Parent directory for the resource tree (<directory>/<name>/<provider>).

registry.description: OCI registry prefix the Composition references for each provider's function module.
